data.content:
Use `&` to combine two `--filter` conditions (AND logic):

```bash
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~OrderServiceTests & TestCategory=Unit"
```

This runs only the 2 tests in `OrderServiceTests` that have `[TestCategory("Unit")]` — i.e., `CreateOrder_ValidInput_ReturnsOrder` and `CreateOrder_NullInput_ThrowsException`.

- `FullyQualifiedName~OrderServiceTests` — matches the class name (substring match via `~`)
- `TestCategory=Unit` — matches the category
- `&` — both conditions must be true
